system.description:
Power extrinsic makes you a slave to another. Power intrinsic makes you a slave to yourself.

LEVEL 3

Fractured Psyche. Your Patron is a power hidden in a deep recess of your mind. You gain proficiency with Leather armor and one type of weapon, and your shadow minions become fragments of your subconscious made manifest.

Defense Mechanism. (1/round) Action/Reaction: Swap places with a shadow minion. Attacks targeting you will hit your shadow minion instead if used as a reaction.

LEVEL 7

Hyperfixation. Your attacks gain a stack of advantage for each of your shadow minions adjacent to the target.

LEVEL 11

Know Your Limits. Your limit for shadow minions increases by WIL, and you may summon a shadow minion for free at the start of your turn.

LEVEL 15

Unified Psyche. (1/encounter) 2 actions: Dispel one of your shadow minions to teleport to the space it was on and make an attack for free (melee/ranged/cantrip). Ignores Rushed Attacks penalty. Repeat this for each of your shadow minions.
